# Code Of Conduct

## Our Standard

dPanel welcomes constructive contributors who help make the project safer, clearer, and more useful.

Expected behavior:

- be respectful and professional
- explain technical disagreements clearly
- keep bug reports and reviews focused on the work
- avoid harassment, insults, spam, or personal attacks
- never post secrets, private customer data, or exploit details publicly

## Unacceptable Behavior

Unacceptable behavior includes:

- harassment or abusive comments
- publishing private information without permission
- posting security vulnerabilities publicly before disclosure is safe
- intentionally misleading maintainers or users
- submitting malicious code

## Enforcement

The maintainer may remove comments, close issues, reject pull requests, or block users who violate this code of conduct.

For security issues, follow `SECURITY.md`.
